exposure_rationale: Juridisch vertalers work almost entirely with digital text products that can be processed remotely, making their core tasks highly exposed to AI automation. Large language models and neural machine translation systems are already capable of handling legal document translation with high accuracy, though the role requires specialized legal terminology knowledge and quality assurance that currently demands human oversight. The combination of routine translation tasks, pattern recognition in legal language, and digital-only work products places this occupation in the high exposure category, though the need for legal expertise and verification prevents it from reaching maximum exposure.

title: Juristen
category: Openbaar bestuur, veiligheid en juridische beroepen
exposure_rationale: Data Protection Officers (DPOs) work primarily with digital information, legal documents, and policy frameworks that are highly conducive to AI analysis and automation. AI can assist significantly with compliance monitoring, data breach detection, policy drafting, risk assessment, and regulatory tracking. However, the role requires substantial human judgment for interpreting complex legislation, stakeholder management, and high-stakes decision-making that cannot be fully automated, preventing a higher score.

title: Beveiligingswerkers
category: Openbaar bestuur, veiligheid en juridische beroepen
exposure_rationale: Beveiligingswerkers (security workers) require constant physical presence on-site to monitor premises, respond to incidents, and provide visible deterrence. While some tasks like surveillance footage review could be partially automated, core responsibilities involve real-time decision-making, physical intervention capabilities, and human judgment in unpredictable situations that current AI cannot reliably handle.

title: Politie-inspecteurs
category: Openbaar bestuur, veiligheid en juridische beroepen
exposure_rationale: Technical crime scene investigators have moderate AI exposure. While some tasks like evidence documentation, photography, report writing, and data analysis can be augmented by AI tools (computer vision for scene analysis, automated report generation, pattern recognition in forensic data), the core work requires physical presence at crime scenes, hands-on evidence handling, professional judgment about evidence integrity, legal compliance, and testimony credibility. The work cannot be fully remote and depends heavily on real-world sensory assessment and chain-of-custody protocols that demand human accountability.

title: Politie en brandweer
category: Openbaar bestuur, veiligheid en juridische beroepen
exposure_rationale: Police work requires constant physical presence, real-world situational judgment, and direct human interaction with the public in unpredictable environments. While some administrative tasks and data analysis could be partially automated, the core duties—patrol, arrest, emergency response, and self-defense—are fundamentally physical and require immediate human decision-making that cannot be delegated to current AI technology.

title: Beveiligingspersoneel
category: Openbaar bestuur, veiligheid en juridische beroepen
exposure_rationale: Security personnel requires constant physical presence for patrolling, access control, and real-world threat assessment that cannot be fully automated. While AI can enhance surveillance systems and video analysis, the core responsibilities—maintaining order, responding to threats, physical intervention, and making context-dependent judgments in unpredictable situations—depend heavily on human presence, judgment, and interpersonal skills. Limited remote capability and significant manual/physical components restrict AI exposure.

title: Militaire beroepen
category: Openbaar bestuur, veiligheid en juridische beroepen
exposure_rationale: This military intelligence and security officer role involves substantial digital work including signal analysis, electromagnetic traffic interception, geolocation data processing, and intelligence report generation—all tasks where AI could significantly augment or automate pattern recognition and data analysis. However, the role retains important elements of human judgment in threat assessment, real-time decision-making in operational contexts, and the need for security clearances and specialized military expertise that cannot be fully delegated to AI systems. The occupation falls into the high-exposure category due to its data-heavy, pattern-recognition nature, though it stops short of very-high exposure because of irreducible human oversight requirements in sensitive military/security decision-making.

title: Technische beroepen
exposure_rationale: This specialized biomedical scientist occupation involves significant digital and analytical work—data analysis, research documentation, and pattern recognition in laboratory findings—which are increasingly automatable by AI tools. However, the role requires hands-on laboratory work (tissue cytogenetics, transcranial magnetic stimulation, clinical decision-making), professional judgment in interpreting complex biomedical results, and direct collaboration with healthcare teams, which limits full automation. The combination of routine analytical tasks that AI can augment and irreplaceable clinical expertise places it in the high exposure category.

title: Ingenieurs en onderzoekers wis.
exposure_rationale: Microelectronics designers work primarily with digital tools (CAE software, circuit design, simulation) and can perform most tasks remotely. AI excels at pattern recognition in circuit optimization, design automation, firmware generation, and technical documentation. However, the role requires specialized domain expertise, creative problem-solving in novel designs, and collaboration with physical prototyping teams, which limits full automation. The work is substantially digital and knowledge-based, making it highly exposed to AI augmentation.

title: Biologen en natuurwetenschappers
exposure_rationale: Biologists' work involves significant digital components including data analysis, molecular modeling, and literature research that AI tools can increasingly support or automate. However, the occupation requires substantial hands-on laboratory work, field research, complex experimental design judgment, and interpretation of biological phenomena that remain difficult for AI to fully replace. The work is a mix of digital knowledge tasks and irreplaceable empirical investigation.

title: Ingenieurs (geen elektrotechniek)
exposure_rationale: Mechanical engineers' work is heavily digital, involving CAD software, computer simulations, technical design, and data analysis—all tasks where AI can provide substantial assistance. However, the occupation retains significant non-automatable elements: complex problem-solving, creative design decisions, supervision of physical manufacturing/installation, and real-world testing and validation that require human expertise and judgment. This positions it in the high-exposure category rather than very-high.

title: Elektrotechnisch ingenieurs
exposure_rationale: Elektrotechnisch ingenieurs work primarily with digital design tools (CAD, circuit simulation software) and their core outputs are digital designs and technical specifications, making these tasks highly susceptible to AI-assisted automation and optimization. However, the occupation retains significant non-automatable components including novel circuit innovation, complex problem-solving in real-world constraints, stakeholder collaboration, and physical testing/validation of prototypes, which require human expertise and judgment.

title: Architecten
exposure_rationale: Architects' work involves significant digital components (BIM, CAD, design software) and pattern recognition tasks that AI can increasingly assist with, such as design optimization, code compliance checking, and preliminary concept generation. However, the occupation requires substantial creative judgment, client interaction, contextual understanding of local regulations and environments, site presence, and interdisciplinary coordination that remain difficult for AI to fully automate. The core creative and decision-making aspects of architectural design, combined with necessary real-world stakeholder engagement, prevent this from reaching the highest exposure categories.

title: Vakspecialisten natuur en techniek
exposure_rationale: Photography teachers have significant AI exposure in content delivery, image analysis, and curriculum design tasks that are increasingly automatable through AI tools. However, the core work—hands-on instruction, student mentoring, classroom management, providing personalized feedback, and fostering creative development—requires substantial human interaction and judgment that AI cannot fully replace. The occupation blends digital/analytical work (photo selection, technical instruction) with irreplaceable interpersonal and pedagogical elements.

title: Technici bouwkunde en natuur
exposure_rationale: PCB design is highly digital work performed almost entirely on computers using specialized CAD and design software, making it highly amenable to AI-assisted automation. AI tools can already assist with circuit layout optimization, component placement, design rule checking, and pattern recognition in schematic analysis. However, the role still requires domain expertise in electrical engineering, creative problem-solving for complex designs, and client interaction that currently necessitate human judgment and oversight.

title: Productieleiders industrie en bouw
exposure_rationale: Productieleiders work with increasingly digital scheduling, monitoring, and data analysis systems that AI tools can substantially augment or automate. However, the role requires on-site presence for real-time oversight, personnel management decisions, quality judgment, and crisis response in physical production environments, which limits full automation. The mix of digital task optimization (planning, reporting, analytics) with essential human judgment and physical-world supervision places this occupation in the high-exposure category.

title: Procesoperators
exposure_rationale: Proces operators in chemical manufacturing have significant AI exposure due to their heavy reliance on digital monitoring systems, data analysis, and parameter optimization. However, they retain substantial non-automatable responsibilities including real-time equipment supervision, safety oversight, and hands-on maintenance that require physical presence and contextual judgment in a hazardous environment. The work combines routine digital tasks (monitoring, testing procedures, ICT systems) with irreducible human oversight needs.

title: Bouwarbeiders
exposure_rationale: Bouwarbeiders (construction workers) perform highly physical, manual labor requiring constant real-world presence, precise hand-eye coordination, and site-specific safety awareness. Their work involves handling materials, operating machinery, and working at heights—tasks that current AI and robotics cannot reliably perform in unstructured outdoor environments. The occupation has minimal exposure to AI-driven automation.

title: Bouwarbeiders ruwbouw
exposure_rationale: Bricklaying (metselaar) is fundamentally a hands-on manual trade requiring constant physical presence on construction sites, precise manual dexterity, and real-time sensory judgment. While some preparatory tasks like material inspection or 3D blueprint interpretation could be aided by AI, the core work—laying bricks with proper spacing, mortar application, and structural alignment—demands skilled physical labor that current robotics cannot reliably replicate in varied real-world conditions.

title: Timmerlieden

While digital tools like 3D schema interpretation and CAD software can support planning, the core work—sawing, forming, mounting, and inspecting wooden elements—demands skilled manual dexterity and physical presence that current AI and robotics cannot meaningfully replace in typical construction contexts.

title: Loodgieters en pijpfitters

exposure_rationale: Welders require significant physical presence, manual dexterity, and hands-on operation of specialized equipment in real-world environments. title: Productcontroleurs

title: Productiemachinebedieners en asse...

title: Hulpkrachten bouw en industrie

title: Software- en applicatieontwikkel.

However, the role retains value in translating business requirements into technical strategy and making judgment calls on complex organizational decisions that require contextual understanding beyond pure data analysis.

title: Gebruikersondersteuning ICT

title: Artsen

While some administrative documentation could be enhanced by AI, the core occupation is fundamentally dependent on in-person human judgment, empathy, and physical intervention in sensitive medical situations.

title: Verzorgenden
exposure_rationale: Verzorgenden (care workers) require constant physical presence for hands-on patient care, including bathing, dressing, mobility assistance, and personal hygiene support that cannot be automated or performed remotely. While some administrative and documentation tasks could be digitized, the core work fundamentally depends on human touch, empathy, physical dexterity, and real-time presence in healthcare settings, making them minimally exposed to AI displacement.

title: Dienstverlenende beroepen
exposure_rationale: This specialized biomedical scientist role involves significant digital and analytical components (data analysis, result validation, documentation) that are increasingly vulnerable to AI automation, particularly in pattern recognition and literature analysis tasks. However, the occupation retains substantial human-dependent elements including clinical decision-making, advisory responsibilities, hands-on laboratory procedures (tissue cytogenetics, cerebrospinal fluid analysis, transcranial magnetic stimulation), and the need for professional judgment in complex translational research that limits AI's complete displacement of the role.

title: Medewerkers persoonlijke dienstve...
exposure_rationale: Thuiszorgmedewerkers perform predominantly physical, hands-on tasks requiring constant real-world presence and direct human interaction (personal hygiene assistance, meal preparation, household tasks, physical support). The work demands sensory judgment, manual dexterity, and empathetic human connection that current AI cannot replicate, making automation minimal despite some potential for administrative or scheduling support tools.

title: Reisbegeleiders
exposure_rationale: Reisbegeleiders (flight attendants/stewards) perform work that is fundamentally physical and requires constant real-world presence with passengers. While some administrative tasks like financial transactions and flight reports could be partially automated, the core duties—serving food/beverages, handling complaints, assisting passengers, and ensuring safety compliance—demand in-person human interaction, physical dexterity, and real-time situational awareness that AI cannot replicate. The occupation has low automation exposure due to its inherently service-oriented and physical nature.

title: Koks
exposure_rationale: Cooking is fundamentally a hands-on occupation requiring physical presence, real-time sensory judgment (taste, smell, texture, temperature), and manual dexterity with tools and ingredients. While AI could assist with menu planning, inventory management, and recipe optimization, the core work of preparing and presenting meals cannot be automated by current technology and requires constant on-site human presence in a kitchen environment.

title: Kelners en barpersoneel
exposure_rationale: Kelners and bar staff require constant physical presence in restaurants/bars to deliver food, interact with guests, and handle cash payments—tasks that cannot be automated or done remotely. While some administrative tasks like reservation processing could be AI-assisted, the core work involving manual dexterity, real-time customer service, and physical table management remains fundamentally human-dependent and resistant to current AI technology.

title: Kappers en schoonheidsspecialisten
exposure_rationale: Hairdressing is a fundamentally physical occupation requiring direct in-person presence, manual dexterity with tools, and sensory judgment about hair texture and color. While appointment scheduling and payment processing could be partially automated, the core work of cutting, styling, and treating hair cannot be performed remotely and requires hands-on interaction with clients.

title: Conciërges en teamleiders schoon.
exposure_rationale: Conciërges perform primarily physical and manual tasks requiring constant on-site presence, including building inspection, cleaning, small repairs, and grounds maintenance. While some administrative tasks like data registration and report writing could be partially automated, the core work demands manual dexterity, physical presence, and real-time responsiveness to building issues and resident needs that cannot be meaningfully replaced by current AI technology.

title: Verleners van overige persoonlij.
exposure_rationale: Dog breeding is fundamentally a hands-on occupation requiring constant physical presence, manual dexterity, and direct animal care that cannot be automated. While administrative tasks like record-keeping and health documentation could be partially digitized, the core work—breeding management, animal handling, health monitoring, feeding, and care—demands human judgment, physical interaction, and real-world presence that AI cannot replace.

title: Schoonmakers en keukenhulpen

title: Schoonmakers
exposure_rationale: Train cleaning is a highly physical, manual occupation that requires constant on-site presence in trains to perform hands-on cleaning tasks like vacuuming, mopping, and waste removal. While some routine aspects exist, the work fundamentally depends on physical dexterity, sensory judgment for cleanliness standards, and direct interaction with physical spaces—all factors that make it minimally exposed to current AI automation.

title: Keukenhulpen
exposure_rationale: Kitchen assistants perform primarily manual, physical tasks requiring constant presence in the kitchen environment—food preparation, cleaning, equipment handling, and workspace management. While some routine tasks like inventory monitoring or following recipes could theoretically be supported by digital tools, the core work demands hands-on food handling, sensory judgment, and real-time physical coordination that current AI cannot replicate without advanced robotics, which remain impractical for most kitchen settings.

title: Transport en logistiek beroepen
exposure_rationale: This multimodal logistics management role involves significant digital work including tracking shipments, analyzing freight rates, managing contracts, and planning transportation activities—all increasingly automatable through AI-driven logistics optimization and data analysis tools. However, the role requires substantial human judgment in strategic decision-making, personnel management, client relationship building, and negotiation skills that currently remain difficult for AI to fully replace, placing it in the high exposure category rather than very high.

title: Bestuurders voertuigen en bediene...
exposure_rationale: Fire truck drivers require constant physical presence, real-world situational awareness, and manual dexterity in high-stress emergency environments. While some administrative tasks (scheduling, record-keeping) could be automated, the core occupation—operating vehicles safely, deploying equipment, and managing rescue operations—is fundamentally incompatible with AI automation and demands human judgment, physical control, and on-site presence.

title: Dekofficieren en piloten
exposure_rationale: Deck officers and pilots require constant physical presence on vessels, real-time situational awareness, and human judgment in navigating dynamic maritime environments and managing crew safety. While some administrative and planning tasks (cargo documentation, route planning) could be digitally assisted by AI, the core responsibilities—navigation, watchkeeping, crew supervision, and emergency response—fundamentally depend on physical presence, sensory perception, and human decision-making in unpredictable conditions.

title: Chauffeurs auto's, taxi's en bes.
exposure_rationale: This occupation involves significant physical and manual components (driving, loading/unloading cargo, handling packages) that require real-world presence and cannot be automated in the near term. While route optimization, navigation systems, and delivery tracking are increasingly AI-enhanced, the core work—vehicle operation, physical package handling, and real-time decision-making in complex driving environments—remains heavily dependent on human skills. Autonomous vehicle technology may eventually disrupt this role, but current AI poses minimal threat to the day-to-day work.

title: Buschauffeurs en trambestuurders
exposure_rationale: Bus drivers and tram operators require constant physical presence, real-world situational awareness, and manual vehicle control that cannot be remotely performed or fully automated with current technology. While autonomous vehicles are under development, they remain years away from widespread deployment, and the occupation involves critical safety responsibilities, passenger interaction, and emergency management that demand human judgment and presence. Core work involves physical dexterity, sensory judgment, and interpersonal skills that are minimally exposed to current AI capabilities.

title: Vrachtwagenchauffeurs
exposure_rationale: Vrachtwagenchauffeurs require constant physical presence, manual dexterity (operating heavy vehicles, loading/unloading cargo), and real-world situational awareness. title: Bedieners mobiele machines
exposure_rationale: Forklift operators perform primarily physical work requiring constant real-world presence in warehouses, manual dexterity, spatial judgment, and hands-on equipment operation. exposure_rationale: This multimodal logistics management role involves significant digital and routine tasks including tracking shipments, analyzing freight rates, managing contracts, and planning transportation activities—all highly susceptible to AI automation and optimization. However, the position still requires human judgment for staff leadership, complex negotiations, customer relationship management, and strategic decision-making that cannot be fully automated, preventing a higher score.

exposure_rationale: This occupation is highly physical and manual, requiring constant real-world presence in retail environments. title: Vuilnisophalers en dagbladenbezo.
exposure_rationale: Hotel porters perform primarily physical tasks requiring constant in-person presence, such as greeting guests, handling baggage, cleaning, and providing personal assistance. title: Beroepsklasse overig
exposure_rationale: Groupage-expediteurs perform predominantly digital and routine tasks including document processing (bills of lading, export permits), tariff analysis, freight management, and coordination activities that are increasingly automatable through AI-driven logistics systems and document processing tools. However, the role retains some non-automatable elements such as client relationship management, negotiation of shipping terms, and real-world verification of cargo requirements that require human judgment and presence, preventing a higher score.

title: Beroepssegment overig
exposure_rationale: Groupage-expediteurs work primarily with digital documentation (bills of lading, shipping documents, tariff analysis, customs regulations) and can perform most tasks remotely through logistics software and online platforms. However, the role requires significant human judgment in negotiating rates, coordinating with multiple parties, understanding complex maritime regulations, and managing relationships with clients and shipping companies, which limits full automation.

title: Beroepsgroep overig
exposure_rationale: This is a catch-all occupational category ('miscellaneous other occupations') without specific descriptor, making precise assessment difficult. The moderate score reflects that such residual categories typically contain mixed occupations—some with routine digital tasks automatable by AI, others requiring physical presence or specialized human judgment. Without knowing the specific roles included, a middle score represents the uncertainty inherent in this broad classification.
